title: Alpha Relived
description: A mod of my Nostalgia Modpack to look like Alpha instead of beta 1.7.3
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbbf9c104c975a5c4c73b389ce09beb105ee13be.png)
# A mod of my modpack Nostolgia Modpack to make it ***look*** like alpha 1.2.6 insted of beta 1.7.3

Features:
* Old textures from alpha
* Old world create menu
* (USE MODERNER BETA IN WORLD CREATE OPTIONS FOR THIS) Alpha generation
* Old Lighting System
* No sprinting, No Hunger system, No Experience system
* Copper is actually useful (can make tools and aurmor now)

If you want to teleport to the farlands, run the following command: /tp @p 12550821 100 100

Current Know Bugs: None, submit them on my github!
